homepage.heroSubline: Precision earthwork for Middle Tennessee's toughest terrain. We handle Nashville's limestone bedrock and rapid growth with proven methods.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Summit Excavation grew from a single bulldozer serving East Nashville renovations to Davidson County's most trusted earthmoving team. Our founder learned the trade digging foundations in Green Hills' clay-heavy soils.
We don't just move dirt—we engineer solutions. Every job starts with laser grading and ends with compaction tests. Our crews train quarterly on Tennessee's erosion control standards.
When the 2020 tornado hit Germantown, we volunteered equipment to clear debris. Now we sponsor little league teams in Franklin and Murfreesboro.

valueProps.title: Bedrock Specialists
valueProps.description: We've cracked every type of limestone formation from Brentwood to Hendersonville without blasting.

valueProps.title: Storm Ready
valueProps.description: Same-day emergency response when Middle Tennessee's severe weather damages properties.

valueProps.title: No Surprises
valueProps.description: Fixed pricing after our free site evaluation—we absorb unexpected bedrock issues.

valueProps.title: Local Knowledge
valueProps.description: 20+ years combined experience with Davidson County's soil composition and permit requirements.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Need a Hole? We Dig It.
homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule your free site assessment today. Same-week availability for most projects.

services.name: Residential Lot Clearing
services.shortDescription: Turn overgrown Nashville properties into build-ready sites without damaging existing trees.
services.description:
Middle Tennessee's rapid growth means clearing everything from East Nashville bungalow lots to Brentwood's wooded estates. Our forestry-equipped excavators selectively remove brush while preserving mature oaks and hickories.

We handle the full process: utility marking, invasive species removal, stump grinding, and erosion control installation. For historic districts like Franklin's downtown, we use smaller equipment to protect antique brickwork and delicate root systems.

Every job includes debris hauling to approved landfills and final grade sloping for proper drainage—critical in Nashville's heavy rainfall climate.
process: Step 1: Survey site for protected trees and underground utilities
Step 2: Mark clearing boundaries with biodegradable paint
Step 3: Remove vegetation with grapple attachments to minimize soil disturbance
Step 4: Grade land to 2% slope away from foundations
benefits: Compliant with Metro Nashville stormwater rules

faq.question: How do you prevent damage to neighboring properties?
faq.answer: We install silt fencing before work begins and use track-mounted equipment that exerts less ground pressure than wheeled vehicles. For tight lots, we employ compact excavators.

faq.question: What happens to the cleared vegetation?
faq.answer: We chip usable material for mulch and haul the rest to the Radnor Yard waste facility. No burning permitted in Davidson County.

services.name: Foundation Excavation
services.shortDescription: Precision digging for Nashville's custom homes and commercial builds.
services.description:
Middle Tennessee's limestone bedrock demands experienced excavators. We've dug foundations for everything from Gulch high-rises to Hendersonville lake houses, adapting to each site's unique challenges.

Our process starts with ground-penetrating radar to locate rock ledges and voids. For Brentwood's luxury estates, we hand-dig around existing tree roots. When encountering solid limestone in Green Hills, we use hydraulic splitters instead of disruptive blasting.

We coordinate closely with structural engineers to achieve exact footing depths. All sites receive laser-level verification and temporary shoring where needed—especially important in Nashville's clay-heavy soils during spring rains.
process: Step 1: Verify property pins and setback requirements
Step 2: Expose bedrock with careful topsoil removal
Step 3: Shape trenches to engineer specifications
Step 4: Install erosion controls per Metro Water Services
benefits: Minimizes vibration damage to nearby homes
Provides clean working space for masons

faq.question: How deep do you typically excavate for foundations?
faq.Answer: Most Nashville-area homes require 36-42" footings to get below frost line, but we always follow the engineer's stamped plans. Some Brentwood estates need 8' depths for basement additions.

services.name: Storm Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Protect your property from Nashville's heavy rains with proper grading and drainage.
services.description:
With Middle Tennessee averaging 47" of annual rainfall—often in intense bursts—proper drainage prevents basement floods and erosion. We design systems tailored to each property's topography.

For East Nashville's historic homes, we install French drains that preserve original landscaping. In Murfreesboro's new developments, we regrade entire lots to direct water away from foundations. Around Old Hickory Lake, we use riprap to prevent shoreline washout.

All work complies with TDEC regulations. We handle permits for curb cuts and storm sewer ties-ins, working closely with Metro Water Services inspectors on commercial projects.
process: Step 1: Conduct topographic survey with laser level
Step 2: Identify natural water flow paths
Step 3: Install appropriate drainage (channel drains, dry wells, etc.)
Step 4: Test system with 1000+ gallons of water
benefits: Prevents foundation cracks from soil expansion
Eliminates standing water that breeds mosquitoes

faq.question: Can you fix my constantly flooded backyard?
faq.Answer: Yes—we've regraded hundreds of Nashville properties. Solutions range from simple swale creation to full dry well systems with overflow piping.

services.name: Pool Excavation
services.shortDescription: Custom digging for Nashville's luxury inground pools.
services.description:
Middle Tennessee's growing luxury market means more pool installations in Brentwood and Franklin. We specialize in precision digs that account for bedrock depth and groundwater levels.

Our compact excavators fit through standard gates, preserving landscaping. For rocky sites in Green Hills, we use micro-blasting techniques approved by Metro Codes. Every project includes spoil removal and final grade preparation for decking crews.

We coordinate with pool companies to ensure proper equipment access and shelf depths. Post-dig, we provide certified elevation surveys showing compliance with setback requirements.
process: Step 1: Verify property lines and utility locations
Step 2: Excavate to exact shape with 6" tolerance
Step 3: Install temporary shoring if needed
Step 4: Haul away all excess material
benefits: Precise contours for vinyl and gunite pools

faq.question: How long does pool excavation typically take?
faq.Answer: Most residential digs complete in 2-3 days depending on soil conditions. Brentwood limestone sites may require 4 days with rock breaking.

services.name: Retaining Walls
services.shortDescription: Structural solutions for Nashville's sloped properties.
services.description:
From The Gulch's terraced lots to Hendersonville's lakefront drops, we build walls that stand the test of time. Our team specializes in both functional and decorative solutions using locally sourced materials.

For historic districts like 12South, we match existing stonework with Tennessee fieldstone. Modern builds often utilize segmental concrete blocks with reinforced cores. Every design accounts for Middle Tennessee's freeze-thaw cycles and heavy rains.

We handle all engineering requirements, including drainage behind walls and proper footing depths. Commercial projects receive stamped plans from our partner structural engineers.
process: Step 1: Analyze soil type and load requirements
Step 2: Excavate to stable subgrade
Step 3: Install proper drainage layers
Step 4: Construct wall with laser-guided alignment

faq.question: What's the average lifespan of a retaining wall?
faq.Answer: Properly built stone or reinforced concrete walls typically last 50+ years in Middle Tennessee. We warranty all workmanship for 10 years.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: Summit excavated our Green Hills addition site with surgical precision. Hit solid limestone at 3 feet but they adapted without blasting—saved our mature dogwoods and finished two days early.

reviews.name: Eleanor R.
reviews.text: After 12South's record rainfall flooded our basement twice, Summit regraded our entire lot and installed a dry well system. Not a drop of water since, even during last April's downpour.

reviews.name: Derrick S.
reviews.text: The crew showed up at 7 AM sharp to dig our Brentwood pool. They navigated tight spaces between our oak trees and even saved the landscaping lights we forgot to move. Depth was perfect for the gunite crew.

reviews.name: Lisa M.
reviews.text: Our Hendersonville lakefront was eroding badly. Summit built a 60' stone wall that looks like it's been there forever. The herringbone drainage system handles Old Hickory Lake's seasonal rises perfectly.

reviews.name: James P.
reviews.text: Cleared our East Nashville bungalow lot without disturbing the neighbors' historic fence. They hauled away 12 tons of brush same-day and left the site ready for our builder to start Monday.

reviews.name: Tanya W.
reviews.text: Murfreesboro's red clay is no joke—Summit still hit our footing depths exactly despite weeks of rain delays. Their tracked equipment didn't tear up our lawn like wheeled loaders would have.

service-areas.title: Nashville Area Excavation Services
service-areas.description: Local excavation contractor serving Davidson County and surrounding communities. Franklin, Murfreesboro, Brentwood, Hendersonville.

serviceAreas.content: Summit Excavation proudly serves Franklin, TN, a historic city known for its charming antebellum homes and vibrant downtown. With a population of around 85,000, Franklin combines rich history with modern growth, making excavation services essential for both preservation and new construction projects. Our team is experienced in navigating the unique challenges posed by Franklin's hot, humid summers, ensuring efficient and reliable service year-round. Whether you're restoring a historic property or breaking ground on a new development, Summit Excavation has the expertise to handle your project with care.
serviceAreas.localContext: Franklin is renowned for its historic downtown and antebellum architecture, attracting both residents and tourists.

serviceAreas.content: Murfreesboro, TN, is a thriving city with a population of approximately 165,000, known for its affordable family-friendly developments and rapid growth. Summit Excavation is proud to support this community with top-tier excavation services tailored to the needs of residential and commercial projects. The hot, humid summers in Murfreesboro require careful planning and execution, and our team is equipped to deliver results despite the challenging climate. From site preparation to utility installation, we ensure your project runs smoothly from start to finish.
serviceAreas.localContext: Murfreesboro is a fast-growing city with a focus on affordable housing and family-oriented communities.

The hot, humid summers can pose challenges for construction, but our team is adept at managing these conditions to deliver flawless results. Whether you're building a custom home or enhancing your property, our precision and attention to detail ensure your vision becomes a reality.
